title: WorldState Cross-Repo Exchange Payload
description: The standardized JSON payload binding the Sofia Holodeck (Agent/Observation) to the Codex Ratchet (Physics Engine). Defines the exact shape of data sent from Sofia for validation, and the response from the Ratchet containing Free Energy penalties.

timestamp.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of the state transition.

agent_state.description: The proposed movement/state change by the RL Agent.

observation_vector.description: The n-dimensional sensor array passed into the QIT Ratchet.

markov_blanket_integrity.description: The agent's current internal confidence/negentropy tracker.

ratchet_validation.description: The response payload from the Codex Ratchet physics engine.

admitted.description: TRUE if the action passed all geometric constraint axes. FALSE if it attempted a conflation (synthetic collapse).

free_energy_delta.description: The scalar Variational Free Energy calculated by fep_ratchet_bridge.py.

reward_signal.description: The strict RL reward mapping (-F). A KILL returns an infinite penalty (-1000.0).
